name: Framework
description: Structured framework for building systems or experiments.

name: Toolkit
description: Bundle of utilities, scripts, and helper tools.

name: Model
description: Published model artifact or model repository.

name: Benchmark
description: Evaluation suite, leaderboard, or benchmark resource.

name: Web App
description: Interactive application accessed through the web.

name: Application
description: End-user application outside a web-only context.

name: Plugin
description: Extension or integration for another system.

name: Documentation
description: Documentation-first resource, guide, or reference artifact.

name: Template
description: Starter kit, scaffold, or reusable project template.
